operational_knowledge_units.title: ShutDownStaging table defines AGV shutdown staging destinations
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the ShutDownStaging table maps where AGVs should go during a shutdown state. Destination mapping depends on whether the AGV has a tote.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Robotics Database / Shut Down Staging Database Model'
Visible text: 'The ShutDownStaging table maps where AGVs should go during a shutdown state.'
Visible text: 'AGVs with totes have an off the end queue and a queue in the center to stage at.'
Visible text: 'AGVs without totes are mapped to sorter locations.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robotics Database Shut Down Staging Database Model. The ShutDownStaging table maps where AGVs should go during a shutdown state. AGVs with totes are assigned an off the end queue and a center staging queue. AGVs without totes are mapped to sorter locations.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Shutdown staging routing differs for AGVs with totes versus without totes
operational_knowledge_units.summary: During shutdown, AGV routing is conditionally assigned by tote status. AGVs carrying totes are routed to queue-based staging areas, while AGVs without totes are routed to sorter locations.
observed_evidence: Visible text identifies shutdown-state destination logic for AGVs
Visible text: 'AGVs with totes have an off the end queue and a queue in the center to stage at.'
Visible text: 'AGVs without totes are mapped to sorter locations.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Shutdown staging routing rule: AGVs with totes stage in an off the end queue and a center queue. AGVs without totes are mapped to sorter locations. This mapping is represented in the ShutDownStaging table.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No explicit shutdown staging update procedure present
